text:
Once upon a time in a small valley, little mouse lived. Every day she went outdoors to find something nice to eat. She ran around her little house nibbling on berries. One day she wanted something sweet. She ran across the road to see a wild apple tree. She climbed up and ate the juicy fruits. Later she saw wild oranges. She ate them too. Suddenly little owl flew down. It stole all her fruit. Poor mouse. She didn't have anything left. She curled up in a little ball under an oak. Eventually an owl flew away hungry.

Poor little mouse. That night she slept soundly. She dreamed of ovals. She woke up smiling.

The next day she discovered something extraordinary! Oval-shaped mushrooms. She went home and dug them up. They were delicious. Those were nice. She soon found more. They tasted sweet! She brought them back to her house. Everyone ate them.

She became famous for her good taste. She often donated her spoils
